project.name: AI游戏策略师

intentProfile.routingReason: User explicitly requests 1:1 replication of all layout, colors, icons, avatars, components, fonts, CTAs, and image assets

project.visualSpecExcerpt: DARK CYBERPUNK DASHBOARD. Bg: #0a0814 base, #0d0b1a deep, #131124 surface, #181530 cards. 3-column layout: left sidebar ~220px flush to edge, main content flex-1, right panel ~280px. Full viewport height dark theme with neon glows. LEFT SIDEBAR: logo 'AI GAME STRATEGIST' at top in purple-cyan gradient text, 8 nav items with lucide icons (项目中心/教材解析/玩法推荐[ACTIVE purple glow]/AI团队组建/工作台/游戏预览/数据分析/发布管理), active item has purple bg #1a1530 with left purple border. Below nav: AI assistant NEXUS persona card - female character with futuristic glasses, purple-pink holographic, text 'AI 助手 NEXUS' + '我已分析完毕'. MAIN HEADER: title 'AI 正在为你的教材设计最佳游戏化方案' 24px bold white, subtitle muted, top-right 'AI 分析引擎运行中' with 98% progress bar purple gradient. CURRENT TEXTBOOK PANEL: card with textbook name '小学科学五年级上册 人教版', stats (126知识点/23实验), core themes as purple chips, learning objectives with purple bullet dots, match analysis section with 98% circular progress ring. AGE SELECTION BAR: 4 horizontal cards (小学6-12岁[ACTIVE purple glow border]/中学12-18岁/大学18-22岁/成人22岁以上) each with avatar icon. 4-GAME GRID 2x2: each card has number badge (01-04), type label (探索冒险类ADVENTURE/模拟经营类SIMULATION/解谜闯关类PUZZLE/角色养成类ROLE-PLAYING), match % with trophy for top, visual thumbnail image, 4 core mechanic circular icons, learning effectiveness 4-bar metrics (知识理解/记忆留存/学习兴趣/应用能力), '选择此方案' CTA button purple gradient. AI COMBINATION SECTION: circular gauge 96% '最佳组合方案', breakdown bars (70%探索/20%解谜/10%模拟), combination advantages list, 3 metric improvements with icons (+42%/+33%/+29%). AI TEAM FORMATION: 6 character cards in 3x2 grid (游戏设计师AI/教育专家AI/剧情设计师AI/关卡设计师AI/美术总监AI/测试分析师AI) each with avatar, name, color theme. FINAL CTA: '团队就绪 READY TO CREATE' large button with purple-pink gradient glow. Effects: glassmorphism, neon borders rgba(139,92,246,0.15), box-shadow glows, gradient text, circular progress rings with conic-gradient.

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: Full dark cyberpunk theme with near-black purple-tinted background (#0a0814), neon purple/pink/cyan accents, and glassmorphism cards
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: body bg #0a0814, cards bg #181530 with border rgba(139,92,246,0.15), neon glow shadows on active/important elements

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: Left sidebar flush to viewport edge, ~220px wide, with logo, 8 nav items, active item '玩法推荐' has purple bg and left border glow, AI assistant persona at bottom
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: Fixed sidebar 220px, h-screen, bg #0d0b1a, nav items with lucide icons 16px + text 14px, active item bg #181530 with 3px left border #8b5cf6 and purple glow, NEXUS persona card at bottom

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: Main header with large title 'AI 正在为你的教材设计最佳游戏化方案', subtitle, and top-right AI engine status with 98% progress bar
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: Title 24px font-bold white, subtitle 14px text-muted, right-side status card with 'AI 分析引擎运行中' label and animated progress bar 98% with purple gradient fill

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: Current textbook panel showing '小学科学五年级上册 人教版' with 126知识点/23实验 stats, core themes as purple chips, learning objectives with purple bullets, and 98% match circular ring
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: Card with textbook info, stat badges, theme chips with purple bg rgba(139,92,246,0.15), objectives list with purple dot bullets, circular progress ring using conic-gradient at 98%

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: 4 age selection cards horizontally: 小学6-12岁 [active with purple glow border], 中学12-18岁, 大学18-22岁, 成人22岁以上, each with avatar icon
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: 4-column grid, each card bg #131124 with avatar icon, active card has border #8b5cf6 and glow shadow, inactive cards have subtle border

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: 2x2 grid of 4 game recommendation cards, each with: number badge (01-04), type label with English subtitle, match percentage (98%/92%/85%/78%) with trophy for #1, thumbnail image, 4 circular mechanic icons, 4-bar learning effectiveness metrics, '选择此方案' CTA
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: 2-col grid gap-4, each card bg #181530 rounded-xl p-5, number badge top-left, match% top-right with trophy for 98%, thumbnail image aspect-video rounded-lg, 4 mechanic icons in row, 4 metric bars with labels and colored fills, CTA button purple gradient full-width

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: AI combination recommendation section with large 96% circular gauge '最佳组合方案', breakdown bars (70%/20%/10%), combination advantages list, and 3 improvement metrics (+42%/+33%/+29%)
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: Section card with left circular gauge using conic-gradient 96%, right side with 3 horizontal breakdown bars colored purple/cyan/pink, advantages list with checkmark icons, 3 metric cards with percentage increases

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: AI team formation: 6 character cards in 3x2 grid, each with unique avatar, role name (游戏设计师AI etc.), and color theme (blue/pink/cyan/purple/gold/green)
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: 3-col 2-row grid, each card bg #181530 with avatar image 64px rounded-full with colored ring, role label, color-themed accent border/glow matching each role

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: Final CTA section '团队就绪 READY TO CREATE' with large button '进入 AI STUDIO 开始创建你的教育游戏' with purple-pink gradient and glow
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: Centered section with heading and large gradient button (purple-to-pink) with box-shadow glow, full text preserved

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: Typography uses sans-serif Chinese font, heading 24px bold, section titles 16px semibold, body 13-14px, small labels 11-12px, with purple/cyan gradient text for special headings
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: font-family PingFang SC/Noto Sans SC, heading text-2xl font-bold, sections text-base font-semibold, body text-sm, labels text-xs, gradient text via bg-clip-text for logo and special titles

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: Game card learning effectiveness metrics use 4 horizontal bars with labels (知识理解/记忆留存/学习兴趣/应用能力) and colored fills at different levels
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: 4-row metric section, each row: label text-xs left + bar track bg #131124 with colored fill (purple/cyan/pink/gold) at specified percentage, percentage text right

restoreVisualCheckpoints.sourceObservation: NEXUS AI assistant persona in sidebar bottom: stylized female character with short dark hair, futuristic glasses/headset, purple-pink holographic effects
restoreVisualCheckpoints.targetImplementation: Avatar image in sidebar bottom card with purple-pink glow border, name 'AI 助手 NEXUS' and status text '我已分析完毕' with description below

Combination: 最佳组合方案 96% / 70%探索冒险 / 20%解谜闯关 / 10%模拟经营
Improvements: 知识留存率提升42% / 学习兴趣提升33% / 应用能力提升29%
Team: 游戏设计师AI / 教育专家AI / 剧情设计师AI / 关卡设计师AI / 美术总监AI / 测试分析师AI

complex metric bars and progress rings
